title: lycium ovatum
intro: Lycium ovatum, also known as the desert box honeysuckle, is a type of flowering shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antidiabetic activities. The health benefits of Lycium ovatum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Lycium ovatum can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
